# Tide Calendar Generator
> Free printable PDF tide calendars for USA and Canadian tide stations.

## About
Tide Calendar Generator (tidecalendar.xyz) creates printable monthly PDF calendars showing daily high and low tide predictions. It covers over 2,200 tide stations across the USA (NOAA) and Canada (CHS).

## Features
- Search by station name or ID
- Generate PDF calendars for any month
- Covers USA stations via NOAA CO-OPS API
- Covers Canadian stations via CHS IWLS API
- Free, no account required

## Usage
Visit https://tidecalendar.xyz, search for a tide station, select a month and year, then download the PDF.

## Contact

- Website: https://mattmanuel.ca
